name: Radish Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salt, garlic powder, Dijon mustard, wine vinegar in a screwtop jar.
2. Add liquid shortening and lemon juice to the mixture.
3. Shake well to blend all ingredients.
4. Coarsely chop watercress, lettuce, and radishes.
5. Place chopped greens and radishes in a salad bowl.
6. Pour the dressing over the greens and toss until well combined.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 FAT EXCHANGE CAL: 60
